title: Sorna

{{Quote|I have placed flowers on the gravesite of a good friend every year. I've tried several times already this year and I always seem to get turned back. Could you please take these flowers to the gravestone marked Shmi at the old Lars' homestead?|Sorna, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FfS" />}}
'''Sorna''' was an [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who lived on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She was an old friend of [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]]. After Shmi Skywalker's [[Death/Legends|death]],<ref name="SWG:FfS" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]],<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref> she used to place [[Flower/Legends|flowers]] on her [[Burial/Legends|grave]] at the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]] every [[Standard year/Legends|year]]. At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], about twenty years later, the old woman Sorna was unable to do so.<ref name="SWG:FfS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> one of her friends, the manager of [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]] [[Cuan Talon]] hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to help the woman.<ref name="SWG:FS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Find Sorna|Tatooine}}</ref> Sorna thus sent the spacer to the Lars homestead to place the flowers for her.<ref name="SWG:FfS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sorna was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:FfS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>

There is a discrepancy between this storyline and [[Ryder Windham]]'s novel, ''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]''. In the novel, it was established that the gravestones on the Lars homestead had all been removed by [[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]] before [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], so it shouldn't be possible for Sorna or the player to place flowers on Shmi's grave.
